title: 7 Chakra Rice Chain Bracelet — Gold-Tone Natural Stone Bracelet
short_description: A gold-tone rice chain bracelet strung with seven vibrant natural chakra stones — a refined everyday piece that blends spiritual symbolism with minimal luxury.
body_html:
Bring harmony, balance, and positive energy into your everyday style with the 7 Chakra Rice Chain Bracelet. Handcrafted with vibrant natural chakra stone beads and a sleek gold-tone rice chain, it blends spiritual symbolism with modern, minimal elegance.

Each stone represents one of the body's seven energy centres — believed to encourage emotional balance, inner peace, confidence, creativity, and overall well-being. The geometric rice-link chain adds a contemporary luxury touch, making this piece equally at home with casual fits and occasion wear.

Stones on this bracelet

  • Black Lava Stone — grounding, stability & protection
  • Red Carnelian — motivation & vitality
  • Tiger Eye — confidence & courage
  • Yellow Calcite — positivity & personal power
  • Green Aventurine — growth & prosperity
  • Amazonite — calm & communication
  • Blue Apatite — clarity & expression
  • Amethyst — wisdom & inner peace

Why you'll love it

  • Premium gold-tone rice chain design
  • Natural chakra stone beads in seven vivid colours
  • Lightweight and comfortable for all-day wear
  • Secure lobster clasp with adjustable extender chain
  • Skin-friendly, anti-tarnish finish
  • Perfect for daily wear, meditation, yoga, and gifting

Whether worn as a meaningful accessory or gifted to someone special, this bracelet is a stylish reminder to stay grounded, balanced, and connected.
seo_title: 7 Chakra Rice Chain Bracelet | Studd Muffyn
seo_description: Gold-tone rice chain bracelet with 7 natural chakra stones — lava, carnelian, tiger eye, aventurine, amethyst & more. Anti-tarnish, adjustable clasp.

metafields.highlights: 7 natural chakra stone beads · Gold-tone rice chain · Anti-tarnish, skin-friendly finish · Adjustable lobster clasp · Lightweight everyday wear
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Gold-tone anti-tarnish rice-link chain; natural stone beads — black lava stone, red carnelian, tiger eye, yellow calcite, green aventurine, amazonite, blue apatite, amethyst.
metafields.care_or_directions: Keep away from water, perfume, and sweat for lasting shine. Wipe gently with a soft dry cloth after wear and store in a dry pouch.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: Are the chakra stones real natural stones?
faqs.a: Yes. The bracelet features natural stone beads — including lava stone, carnelian, tiger eye, aventurine, and amethyst — each with its own natural colour and texture, so every piece is subtly unique.

faqs.q: Will the gold chain tarnish or fade?
faqs.a: The rice chain has a gold-tone, anti-tarnish finish. To keep it looking new, avoid water, perfume, and sweat, and store it in a dry pouch after wear.

faqs.q: Is the bracelet adjustable? Will it fit my wrist?
faqs.a: Yes. It closes with a secure lobster clasp and an extender chain, so you can adjust it for a comfortable fit on most wrist sizes.

faqs.q: Can both men and women wear this bracelet?
faqs.a: Absolutely. The minimal rice chain and compact bead design make it a unisex piece that pairs well with everyday, ethnic, and occasion looks.

faqs.q: Is it suitable for daily wear, yoga, or meditation?
faqs.a: Yes. It is lightweight, skin-friendly, and comfortable for all-day wear — a popular choice for meditation, yoga, and everyday spiritual styling.

faqs.q: Does it come ready for gifting?
faqs.a: Yes. It arrives in Studd Muffyn brand packaging, making it a thoughtful gift for birthdays, festivals, and wellness-minded loved ones.
